steps.title: Identify the controlled variable
steps.content: Soil moisture can vary in the wild and influence plant chemistry. Walsh and colleagues avoided that confound by growing individually potted mustard plants in a controlled environment while introducing different microbial communities.

steps.title: Reject misstated goals
steps.content: A overstates what the method proves, B says the study re-created wild conditions, and C reverses the issue by focusing on microbial effects on moisture. The controlled method separates microbial-community effects from moisture effects that could appear in nature. The answer is D.
